name: map
_note: Geospatial incident layer merging live USGS quakes + NWS alerts (free no-key feeds, 5-min cache). Network failure degrades gracefully: each source is independently try/caught and records an *Error key in result.sources, so the macro still returns ok:true with whatever incidents it could fetch (incidents:[] when both feeds are down). A read with {} → ok:true.
